pi_items.source: GIMP source code (emboss.c) and official documentation

pi_items.metadata_value: Typically 135° (claimed in README as 'natural top-left lighting')
pi_items.source: GIMP emboss.c source code defaults and search results confirming azimuth default is 30.0, not 135.0
GIMP emboss.c source code and official documentation confirming elevation default is 45.0

pi_items.verified_value: Default depth is 20; range is typically 0-255 depending on GIMP version
pi_items.source: GIMP emboss.c source code showing default depth of 20; typical user range may vary

pi_items.metadata_value: Emboss filter transforms a color photograph into a grayscale relief appearance
pi_items.verified_value: True - emboss filter produces characteristic grayscale relief effect
pi_items.source: GIMP documentation and filter description: 'stamps and carves the active layer giving it relief with bumps and hollows'

pi_items.metadata_value: Emboss emphasizes edges and creates 3D appearance
pi_items.verified_value: True - filter creates relief with directional lighting and edge emphasis
pi_items.source: GIMP documentation describing emboss as creating relief with 'bright areas raised and dark ones carved'

pi_items.verified_value: Image successfully downloaded and verified as valid JPEG (1000x667 pixels, 61KB)
pi_items.source: Direct HTTP download test confirmed image is accessible and is a real JPEG image

pi_items.verified_value: Image ID appears to have typo (d68292c34d19 in script vs d68292c34b19 in web search results); fallback may not work correctly
pi_items.source: Web search indicates correct ID is d68292c34b19, but setup script uses d68292c34d19 - download test of script URL failed (exit code 8)

pi_items.metadata_value: Real photographs from Unsplash with synthetic fallback image
pi_items.verified_value: Real photographs from public Unsplash API (primary source); falls back to synthetically generated test image if downloads fail
pi_items.source: setup_emboss_task.sh script shows fallback to ImageMagick-generated geometric shapes if both Unsplash URLs fail

privileged_info_summary: The emboss filter is correctly located in GIMP at Filters → Distorts → Emboss with three parameters: Azimuth, Elevation, and Depth. The elevation default of 45° is correct. However, the README incorrectly states the azimuth default as 135° when the actual default is 30°. The typical depth range of 3-10 is also incorrect; the actual default is 20. The task uses real Unsplash images (primary source photo-1518837695005-2083093ee35b works correctly), with a fallback synthetic image if downloads fail. The second Unsplash fallback URL contains a photo ID typo in the setup script.
